name: I need this fast. What is the quickest way to get a usable knowledge graph?

mainEntity.name: I need this fast. What is the quickest way to get a usable knowledge graph?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you have urgent needs, start with a narrow scope: one dataset, one domain, and one output format. That approach usually delivers useful results faster than trying to model the entire business at once.
acceptedAnswer.description: Limit the scope to one dataset and one domain to get a usable graph faster.

description: Limit the scope to one dataset and one domain to get a usable graph faster.
